scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    e.EmployeeID,
    e.FirstName+' '+e.LastName AS EmployeeName,
    e.Title AS EmployeeRole,
    m.FirstName+' '+m.LastName AS ManagerName
FROM
    Northwind.Employees AS e
LEFT JOIN
    Northwind.Employees AS m
ON
    e.ReportsTo=m.EmployeeID',

query: 'SELECT
    o.CustomerID,
    p.ProductID,
    o.OrderDate,
    o.ShippedDate,
    SUM(od.Quantity) AS SaleUnits,
    SUM(od.Quantity*p.UnitPrice) AS ExpectedSaleValue,
    SUM(od.Quantity*od.UnitPrice) AS PlannedSaleValue,
    SUM(od.Quantity*od.UnitPrice*od.Discount) AS DiscountValue,
    SUM(od.Quantity*od.UnitPrice*(1-od.Discount)) AS ActualSaleValue
FROM
    Northwind.Orders AS o
JOIN
    Northwind.[Order Details] AS od
ON
    o.OrderID=od.OrderID
JOIN
    Northwind.Products as p
ON
    od.ProductID=p.ProductID
WHERE
    ShippedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    o.CustomerID,
    p.ProductID,
    o.OrderDate,
    o.ShippedDate',

query: 'SELECT
    o.CustomerID,
    p.ProductID,
    o.EmployeeID,
    o.OrderDate,
    o.ShippedDate,
    SUM(od.Quantity) AS SaleUnits,
    SUM(od.Quantity*p.UnitPrice) AS ExpectedSaleValue,
    SUM(od.Quantity*od.UnitPrice) AS PlannedSaleValue,
    SUM(od.Quantity*od.UnitPrice*od.Discount) AS DiscountValue,
    SUM(od.Quantity*od.UnitPrice*(1-od.Discount)) AS ActualSaleValue
FROM
    Northwind.Orders AS o
JOIN
    Northwind.[Order Details] AS od
ON
    o.OrderID=od.OrderID
JOIN
    Northwind.Products as p
ON
    od.ProductID=p.ProductID
WHERE
    ShippedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    o.CustomerID,
    p.ProductID,
    o.EmployeeID,
    o.OrderDate,
    o.ShippedDate',
